title: Starcatcher's Delight
description: A Farmer's Delight addon adding food related to Starcatcher
body:
**Starcatcher's delight adds new tasty foods related to Starcatcher's fishes for all your cooking needs! 🐟 🍣**

![Dishes](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1450970/description_fdc24c6f-d567-4999-8d93-c0cee191df94.png)


There are dishes unique to specific fishes, as well as generic dishes with the quality depending on the rarity of the fish used! A legendary fish will be cut into legendary fish fillets which will make the legendary version of the dish.

Legendary food will always award some absorption hearts!


**Each food has a unique hand written description, including variations depending on the quality crafted! 🍣**

![Descriptions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e663ca426463053a5a839ef2410ad892ecf497c.png)


Coming soon:

- more foods lol
- (and placeable foods too)
- custom buffs and effects for the special dishes


**🌸 Join the discord! 🌸 [https://discord.gg/tCs89QTuzn](https://discord.gg/tCs89QTuzn)**
